{{Quote|There it is… Boonda's Moon! The ship sensors should locate Boonda's fortress.|A reprogrammed [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="Droids 3">[[Droids (1995) 3|''Droids'' (1995) 3]]</ref>}}
'''Boonda's fortress''' was located on [[Boonda's Moon]]. It was home to a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory owned by [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

{{Struct-stub}}
